code:
sequenceDiagram participant P as Player participant Boot as Bootstrap participant LD as DNS resolver participant AD as Authoritative DNS server participant SM as cDS::Session Management participant sNA as cDS::Node-A participant sNB as cDS::Node-B participant TC as cDS::TC participant NA as cDS::Node-C participant CS as cDS::Content Steering Servers participant TE as cDS::Telemetry autonumber P->>Boot: get session bootstrap Boot->>P: Bootstrap details e.g. endpoint, ad serving parameters, etc %% resolve Session Management server domain name P->>LD: query cDS::Session Management domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Session Management domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Session Management Server IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Session Mangement Server IP %% request master manifest from Session Management server Note over P, SM: request master manifest from cDS::Session Management P->>SM: GET /master manifest Note over P, SM: #35;EXTM3U
#35;EXT-X-VERSION:3
#35;EXT-X-CONTENT-STEERING:SERVER-URI="https://cs.harmonic.com/"
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::Node-A"
https://nodeA.harmonic.com/01.m3u8
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::Node-B"
http://nodeB.harmonic.com/01.m3u8
#35;EXT-X-STREAM-INF:PROGRAM-ID=1,BANDWIDTH=2297761,RESOLUTION=960x540,FRAME-RATE=30.000,PATHWAY-ID="cDS::TC"
https://tc.harmonic.com/01.m3u8..... SM->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) %% request steering manifest from Content Steering server Note over P, CS: request steering manifest from cDS: Content Steering P->>LD: query cDS::Content Steering domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Content Steering domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Content Steering Server IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Content Steering Server IP P->>CS: GET /steering manifest Note over CS, P: {IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
} CS->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) Note over P, sNA: request variant manifest from cDS::Node A P->>LD: query cDS::Node A domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node A domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node A IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node A IP P->>sNA: TCP SYN Note over P, sNA: cDS::Node A is down
TCP retransmission timer timeout
Player fail over to cDS::Node B Note over TE: cDS::Telemetry detect cDS::Node A is down par TE->>CS: update routing decision (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) and TE->>SM: update routing decision (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) end Note over P, sNB: Player fail over to cDS::Node B P->>LD: query cDS::Node B domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node B domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node B IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node B IP Note over P, sNB: GET /variant manifest P->>sNB: TCP SYN sNB->>P: ACK, SYN P->>sNB: SYN Note over P, sNB: #35;EXTM3U
#35;EXT-X-TARGETDURATION:4
#35;EXT-X-MEDIA-SEQUENCE:432137172
#35;EXT-X-VERSION:3
#35;EXT-X-PROGRAM-DATE-TIME:2024-10-10T08:24:48.831Z
#35;EXTINF:3,
20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts
#35;EXT-X-PROGRAM-DATE-TIME:2024-10-10T08:24:52.031Z
EXTINF:5,
20240927T075714-01-432137173.ts
#35;......... sNB->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) %% establish TCP connection, 3 way handshake Note over P, sNB: request video segments P->>sNB: GET /20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts %% cDS:: Node start to push video segment Note over sNB, P: server start pushing video segments sNB->>P: TCP segment (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) sNB->>P: TCP segment (IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) P->>sNB: ACK (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) %% packet start missing and player request retransmission sNB->>P: TCP segment(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode) sNB->>P: TCP segment(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) Note over sNB, P: packet loss, retransmission timer timeout, send duplicate ACK to request retransmission P->>sNB: ACK (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) sNB->>P: reset connection sNB->>TE: report packet loss par TE->>CS: update routing decision (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) and TE->>SM: update routing decision (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) end %% player fail over to cDS::TC Note over P, TC: Player fail over to cDS::TC P->>LD: query cDS::TC domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::TC domain name AD->>LD: cDS::TC IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::TC IP P->> TC: GET /variant manifest TC->>P: 302 Found\nLocation: cDS::Node C P->>LD: query cDS::Node C domain name LD->>AD: query cDS::Node C domain name AD->>LD: cDS::Node C IP for that DNS resolver LD->>P: cDS::Node C IP P->>NA: GET /variant manifest NA->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker) loop P->>NA: GET video/audio segments NA->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) end Note over P, CS: steering manifest expire, request an updated steering manifest P->>CS: GET /steering manifest Note over CS, P: cDS::Node A and cDS::Node B are removed from the list
{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]
} CS->>P: 200 OK\n(IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream)

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为cDS系统设计一个完整的会话建立和故障转移流程图。核心场景是Player如何通过Bootstrap获取配置，再经过DNS解析连接到Session Management服务器。
明白。Bootstrap返回的应该包含哪些具体信息？比如endpoint地址和广告服务参数？
对，Bootstrap details里要包括endpoint和ad serving parameters等。然后Player需要查询cDS::Session Management的域名，经过DNS resolver到Authoritative DNS server解析。
好的，我先画出Bootstrap阶段和DNS解析链。接下来Player向Session Management请求master manifest，这个GET请求需要标注清楚。
master manifest的响应内容很关键，要包含EXTM3U头、版本信息，还有EXT-X-CONTENT-STEERING指向Content Steering Servers的URI。另外要有三条PATHWAY-ID分别对应Node-A、Node-B和TC。
每条PATHWAY的BANDWIDTH都是2297761，RESOLUTION 960x540，FRAME-RATE 30.000，对吗？Node-A和TC用https，Node-B用http？
没错，这是为了体现不同的部署场景。Session Management返回200 OK，标记为IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode。接下来Player需要再次DNS解析去获取Content Steering的steering manifest。
已添加DNS解析链到Content Steering Servers。steering manifest的响应要包含什么？我看到标记了IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic和IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。
对，steering manifest返回200 OK标记为IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。然后Player尝试连接Node-A，这里要设计故障场景——Node-A宕机，触发failover到Node-B。
TCP SYN之后Node-A无响应，retransmission timer超时？同时Telemetry要检测到Node-A宕机？
是的，Telemetry检测到后并行更新Content Steering和Session Management的路由决策，分别标记为IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController和IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
已添加par并行块。Player failover到Node-B，需要完整的DNS解析链，然后TCP三次握手成功，获取variant manifest。
variant manifest要包含完整的M3U8信息：TARGETDURATION 4、MEDIA-SEQUENCE、PROGRAM-DATE-TIME时间戳，还有具体的ts片段。Node-B返回200 OK标记为IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
视频片段传输部分，Node-B向Player推送TCP segment，需要标记IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController和IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode？
对，然后Player返回ACK标记为IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。接下来要设计第二个故障场景——packet loss导致连接重置。
已添加packet loss场景：retransmission timer timeout，duplicate ACK请求重传，最终Node-B reset connection并向Telemetry报告。
Telemetry再次并行更新路由决策，这次分别标记为IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream和IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。然后Player failover到TC。
TC这里比较特殊，返回302 Found重定向到Node-C，而不是直接服务？
是的，TC作为流量控制节点，做重定向。Player需要再解析Node-C的域名，然后Node-C返回200 OK标记为IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker。
已添加302重定向和Node-C的完整交互。最后用loop表示持续的音视频片段传输，Node-C返回200 OK标记为IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
还需要一个收尾场景：steering manifest过期后，Player重新请求，这次Content Steering Servers把Node-A和Node-B从列表中移除，响应标记为IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker和IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream。
检查整个流程，Node-C在图例中应该标记为cDS::Node-C，和前面的sNA、sNB命名风格保持一致？
不对，Node-C应该是NA，不是sNC。前面的sNA和sNB表示session Node A/B，而Node-C是独立的节点，用NA表示cDS::Node-C。
已修正为NA。再确认一下Session Management响应中的拼写，Session Mangement应该是Session Management？
是拼写错误，要改成Session Management。另外检查所有IoT标记的完整性，确保每个200 OK都有对应的工业物联网组件标记。
已修正拼写并核对所有IoT标记。现在确认一下TCP三次握手的细节：SYN、ACK-SYN、SYN-ACK的交互顺序正确吗？
对的，Player发SYN，Node-B回ACK+SYN，Player再发SYN（应该是ACK，但按你画的继续）。关键是体现连接建立成功。
已调整。再看DNS解析链，每个节点查询都有完整的LD到AD再返回的流程，没有遗漏。
最后确认autonumber要开启，方便阅读时对照步骤。整个流程涵盖了Bootstrap、DNS解析、master manifest、steering manifest、双故障转移、302重定向和动态列表更新，比较完整了。
已启用autonumber。所有Note over的注释内容也已核对，包括EXTM3U的详细字段和故障场景说明。
variant manifest中的时间戳格式是2024-10-10T08:24:48.831Z，片段命名是20240927T075714-01-432137172.ts，这个对应关系对吗？
是的，MEDIA-SEQUENCE 432137172对应第一个ts文件，时间戳和EXTINF时长都已核对。整个序列图现在包含完整的工业物联网流媒体故障转移场景。
很好，这个设计覆盖了cDS系统的核心可靠性机制，通过Telemetry实现实时故障检测和路由更新，结合Content Steering的动态调度，确保工业物联网场景下的流媒体服务连续性。
